2603.24080.title: LLMpedia: A Transparent Framework to Materialize an LLM's Encyclopedic Knowledge at Scale
2603.24080.paper_summary: Benchmarks such as MMLU suggest flagship language models approach factuality saturation, with scores above 90\%. We show this picture is incomplete. \emph{LLMpedia} generates encyclopedic articles entirely from parametric memory, producing ${\sim}$1M articles across three model families without retrieval. For gpt-5-mini, the verifiable true rate on Wikipedia-covered subjects is only 74.7\% -- more than 15 percentage points below the benchmark-based picture, consistent with the availability bias of fixed-question evaluation. Beyond Wikipedia, frontier subjects verifiable only through curated web evidence fall further to 63.2\% true rate. Wikipedia covers just 61\% of surfaced subjects, and three model families overlap by only 7.3\% in subject choice. In a capture-trap benchmark inspired by prior analysis of Grokipedia, LLMpedia achieves substantially higher factuality at roughly half the textual similarity to Wikipedia. Unlike Grokipedia, every prompt, artifact, and evaluation verdict is publicly released, making LLMpedia the first fully open parametric encyclopedia -- bridging factuality evaluation and knowledge materialization. All data, code, and a browsable interface are at https://llmpedia.net.
2603.24080.paper_summary_zh: 基準如 MMLU 顯示，旗艦語言模型接近事實飽和，得分超過 90\%。我們展示這個畫面是不完整的。 \emph{LLMpedia} 完全從參數記憶生成百科全書文章，產生約 100 萬篇文章，涵蓋三個模型系列，且不進行檢索。對於 gpt-5-mini，維基百科覆蓋主題的可驗證真實率僅為 74.7\% -- 比基準圖像低出超過 15 個百分點，這與固定問題評估的可用性偏見一致。超越維基百科，僅通過策展的網路證據可驗證的前沿主題真實率進一步下降至 63.2\%。維基百科僅涵蓋 61\% 的顯示主題，且三個模型系列在主題選擇上僅重疊 7.3\%。在一個受 Grokipedia 先前分析啟發的捕獲陷阱基準中，LLMpedia 在文本相似度約為維基百科一半的情況下，實現了顯著更高的事實性。與 Grokipedia 不同，每個提示、工件和評估判決都公開發布，使 LLMpedia 成為第一個完全開放的參數百科全書 -- 橋接事實性評估和知識實現。所有數據、代碼和可瀏覽的介面都在 https://llmpedia.net。
2603.24080.author: Muhammed Saeed et.al.
